prompt: Create a vertical fantasy anime illustration of Suikyo, the Water Mirror maiden standing barefoot on a perfectly reflective moonlit lake under a deep blue starry sky and bright Milky Way. She is a graceful young woman with very long flowing silver-blue hair, seen in a three-quarter back pose, her hair and translucent ribbons streaming dramatically to the right as if moved by a gentle night wind; keep her face softly obscured or turned away, with no sharp facial details. Dress her in an ethereal pale ice-blue high-fantasy gown made of sheer layered chiffon, crystal beading, silver embroidery, snowflake ornaments, shoulder straps, a high side slit, and a long trailing train that spreads across the water like glass petals. Add delicate floral and crystal hair accessories, a small anklet, sparkling droplets, and tiny star-like highlights on the fabric. The water surface should mirror her full body and gown clearly, with circular ripples around her feet and luminous reflections of stars. On the left side, include a large ornate crescent-ring structure made of silver branches, ice, and crystal, partly framing the figure; hanging beside it is the vertical Japanese text 水鏡 with a small dangling crystal ornament. Surround the scene with glowing butterflies, white-blue lotus flowers in the foreground corners, tiny firefly lights, scattered snowflake motifs, and magical particles. Background: tranquil horizon line with distant mountains, pastel twilight glow near the horizon, deep cobalt night above, dense stars and nebula clouds. Visual style: ultra-detailed Japanese fantasy key visual, luminous watercolor and digital painting blend, soft bloom lighting, cool blue-violet palette, delicate linework, dreamy atmosphere, high detail, elegant composition, no watermark, no modern objects, no extra readable text beyond the vertical Japanese characters.
